sql_array: CREATE TABLE test_vectors (id UInt32, vector1 Array(Float64), vector2 Array(Float64), p Float64, is_active UInt8 DEFAULT 1);
SELECT id, LpDistance(vector1, vector2, IF(is_active = 1, p, 1)) AS distance FROM test_vectors WHERE LpDistance(vector1, vector2, 1) > 3 AND is_active = 1;
SELECT id, (SELECT LpDistance(vector1, vector2, MAX(p)) FROM test_vectors WHERE is_active = 1) AS max_distance FROM test_vectors GROUP BY id HAVING max_distance IS NOT NULL;
SELECT id, vector1, vector2, LpDistance(vector1, vector2, p) AS calculated_distance FROM test_vectors WHERE LpDistance(vector1, vector2, p) AND is_active = 1 AND p IS NOT NULL;
CREATE TABLE temp_vectors AS SELECT id, LpDistance(vector1, vector2, p) AS distance FROM test_vectors WHERE p IS NOT NULL;
SELECT SUM(LpDistance(vector1, vector2, IFNULL(p, 2.0))) AS total_distance FROM temp_vectors;
SELECT id, vector1, vector2, LpDistance(vector1, vector2, p) FROM test_vectors WHERE LpDistance(vector1, vector2, '1.0') > 0.5 AND is_active = 1;
ALTER TABLE test_vectors ADD COLUMN created_at DateTime DEFAULT now();

SELECT id, LpDistance(vector1, vector2, p) AS distance FROM test_vectors WHERE distance < (SELECT AVG(distance) FROM (SELECT LpDistance(vector1, vector2, IFNULL(p, 1.0)) AS distance FROM test_vectors));
